next_recommended_work: Keep expanding arbitrary greenfield trials opportunistically across more real project families; the two audit-required non-curated API/library and browser/tool trials are now accepted and their recurring gaps were promoted into general contracts.
Install or provide a browser runtime such as Playwright/Chromium if full screenshot and canvas-pixel validation should become mandatory instead of optional runtime evidence.
Decide whether Android templates belong in this goal now or should remain explicitly deferred.

greenfield_architect.py greenfield_model_runtime_defaults gives ImplementationWorker and RepairWorker longer timeouts, larger max tokens, and larger context windows than planning/review roles so real local model code synthesis is not forced through short planning defaults

greenfield_live_trial.py runs a real no-replay greenfield trial against the configured OpenAI-compatible model endpoint and writes compact synthesis, verification, review, and ledger status for debugging
greenfield_live_trial.py allocate_live_trial_root prevents same-second workspace collisions for parallel or rapid live-model trials
greenfield_verification_worker.py passes verification failure signatures and results into GreenfieldImplementationWorker synthesis repair
greenfield_review_worker.py calls model guidance for GreenfieldReviewer and consumes structured JSON status/blockers/warnings into model_findings

greenfield_verification_worker.py calls model guidance for GreenfieldRepairWorker and consumes structured/fenced JSON repair guidance in bounded line-removal, exact-replace, AST-guided return-expression, AST-guided constant, and AST-guided small function-body repair execution

greenfield_repair_live_trial.py records live GreenfieldRepairWorker repair outcomes separately from full project-creation trials, including guided repair strategy evidence versus module_synthesis_repair fallback
greenfield_project.py writes greenfield_model_guidance_ledger.json so each run records role, stage, and guidance status

focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_executor_uses_injected_model_for_full_synthesis_path proves a model-provided file-set and per-module implementation can pass executor verification, GreenfieldReview, reports, and ledger checks

Ceraxia review_gate.py greenfield_project_acceptance_from_worker uses project_creation execution intent, implemented execution_result, applied module synthesis, passed verification, passed GreenfieldReview, passed definition of done, and absence of execution blockers as the outer review source for greenfield projects
Ceraxia review_gate.py greenfield_project_acceptance_from_worker treats file-set synthesis as advisory when module synthesis, verification, GreenfieldReview, and definition of done pass

Ceraxia self_test.py test_project_creation_mode_uses_greenfield_review_as_outer_gate covers the high-risk Telegram bot project_creation case that previously failed on legacy planning/surface gates despite a passed greenfield project package
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_model_runtime_defaults_allow_code_synthesis_latency_and_tokens covers the longer runtime defaults for implementation synthesis
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_live_trial_compact_result_exposes_model_synthesis_status covers the live-trial report shape used to diagnose real model failures
focused_self_test.py covers live-trial directory allocation and code-payload JSON recovery for invalid regex escapes, literal newlines, unescaped code quotes, and bounded reformat retry
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_executor_blocks_when_model_synthesis_is_unavailable proves template fallback no longer masks a dead model

greenfield_live_trial.py accepted no-replay local-model CLI, FastAPI health, FastAPI inventory operations, static todo, Vite todo dashboard, Vite kanban board, browser game, sales data pipeline, local-agent router, and Telegram bot runs with GreenfieldArchitect, GreenfieldImplementationWorker file-set synthesis, GreenfieldImplementationWorker module synthesis, GreenfieldRepairWorker where needed, and GreenfieldReviewer recorded in the model guidance ledger

Ceraxia verification_report.py uses greenfield_project.verification as the authoritative wrapper-level verification evidence for project_creation runs, preventing stale generic commands from blocking a passed greenfield project

greenfield_live_trial.py named operations_dashboard scenario proves GreenfieldArchitect, GreenfieldImplementationWorker, and GreenfieldReviewer all consumed live model guidance while module synthesis, verification, review, model ledger, and scenario expectations passed together
greenfield_live_trial.py sales_pipeline and local_agent_router named scenarios prove live model guidance can produce accepted coordinated file-set and module synthesis across non-API stacks

greenfield_repair_live_trial.py agent_router_multi_file scenario proves live GreenfieldRepairWorker/GreenfieldImplementationWorker repair guidance can repair a larger local-agent package across registry/schema/session/runner/contract modules while preserving tests as oracle

greenfield_repair_live_trial.py large_exact_replace and large_function_body scenarios prove live GreenfieldRepairWorker guidance can perform bounded repair on larger projects without module synthesis fallback when the audit contract forbids it
greenfield_live_trial.py browser_game scenario proves live model guidance can satisfy a stricter frontend/game artifact contract rather than only backend/data/local-agent contracts

greenfield_live_trial.py arbitrary policy-rule-engine library trial proves GreenfieldArchitect model constraints can reshape contracts and GreenfieldImplementationWorker can synthesize requested modules/tests with complete model guidance ledger and passed review

greenfield_live_trial.py arbitrary FastAPI service/library hybrid trial proves live GreenfieldArchitect, GreenfieldImplementationWorker file-set/module synthesis, GreenfieldRepairWorker, and GreenfieldReviewer can converge on a non-curated API/library project with complete model ledger and passed verification/review

greenfield_live_trial.py arbitrary browser diagram-map tool trial proves live GreenfieldArchitect, GreenfieldImplementationWorker file-set synthesis, and GreenfieldReviewer can converge on a non-curated static browser tool with complete model ledger and passed verification/review
requirements.remaining_risk: Live model integration is proven across multiple stacks and arbitrary non-curated project families with complete model guidance ledgers. Remaining risk is operational breadth and model quality variance, not missing integration.

evidence: greenfield_memory_worker.py records stack, dependencies, verification, stop evidence, repaired files, review status, acceptance features, scenario status, and reusable learnings
greenfield_memory_worker.py records definition_of_done evidence rows from GreenfieldReview so future runs can learn which completion proof was missing
greenfield_memory_worker.py builds and updates greenfield_memory_index.json with recent runs, template/status counters, common review/dependency blockers, and reusable learnings
greenfield_project.py writes greenfield_memory_record.json, greenfield_memory_index.json, and greenfield_run_report.json after each run
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_memory_worker_records_definition_of_done_evidence_matrix verifies DoD evidence/missing_evidence is preserved in memory
focused_self_test.py and Ceraxia self tests verify report artifacts
requirements.remaining_risk: Memory is still file-based in the greenfield workspace; it now has an aggregate index, but no cross-workspace retrieval/ranking service is implemented yet.

summary: Greenfield project creation pipeline has contract, architect, scaffold, implementation, dependency, verification, review, templates, model integration, reports, memory, and live non-curated evidence across API/library and browser/tool projects.
